title: feat: use live model catalog in dashboards
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds category and display metadata to model list API responses.
- Loads Enter model tables and key-permission model chips from `/models`.
- Removes registry fallback from the changed dashboard and public-site model-list consumers.
- Updates the public site model hook to use live model endpoints.

Checks:
- `npm run typecheck` in `enter.pollinations.ai`
- `npm run typecheck` in `gen.pollinations.ai`
- `npm run build:frontend` in `enter.pollinations.ai`
- `npm run build` in `pollinations.ai`
- `npx vitest run test/pricing-data.test.ts` in `enter.pollinations.ai`

gist.headline: Live from the hive
gist.blurb: The hive's menu is now live. Dashboards and key settings pull straight from the source, so you'll spot new models the second they bloom.
gist.summary: The Enter dashboard, public site, SDK, and MCP server now fetch model lists dynamically from the live `/models` endpoint instead of relying on hardcoded registry fallbacks.
gist.impact: Users will instantly see newly added models in the dashboard tables and API key permission settings the moment they are deployed to the platform.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot looking at a glowing, constantly updating menu board or catalog of seeds/flowers. The robot's screen shows a live list, representing the dynamic fetching of models.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny visor and a chunky Monitor Robot looking at a glowing, constantly updating wooden menu board in a digital garden. The robot's screen displays a live list of seeds and flowers. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm.
